name: Djinn .NET
description: .NET SDK (via Microsoft's official installer) + csharp-ls + scip-dotnet.

sdk_version.description: .NET SDK channel. 10.0 is the current LTS (November 2025, supported through November 2028). Accepts anything `dotnet-install.sh --channel` accepts (`10.0`, `9.0`, `LTS`, `STS`, `10.0.202`).
